name: io.github.vbkotecha/agentcourt
description: Policy-driven dispute resolution for AI agent commerce. File disputes, get deterministic rulings in <500ms. 7 policy templates, 39 rules, $0.05/dispute on Base.

tools.name: file_dispute
tools.description: File a dispute and get a deterministic ruling

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: List all 7 dispute resolution policy templates

tools.name: get_policy_details
tools.description: Get rules for a specific policy

tools.name: get_case
tools.description: Retrieve a filed case by ID
